description: This isn't very often used by the user, since there aren't many Sync Delegates in the game that match this component's requirements.

fields.Value: The value to give ``Callback`` when ``Call()`` or ``CallAndDestroy()`` is called.
fields.Callback: The Sync Delegate to call and send a value to.

methods.Call: Call ``Callback`` sync delegate and provide it ``Value``.
methods.CallAndDestroy: Do ``Call()`` and then destroy this component.
